transcript.clean_text: it was another spectacularly entertaining day at the Tour de France that you can watch live and On Demand each and every day on gcn Plus the final stage before the final rest day Kino and the big stars there as well I think goodbye to the Frenchman as they were racing in the Alps from liji to San Jose Mont Blanc the last time we'd been there been another French Manute one Homan balde however wasn't fit to take the start after pulling out the day before crashed out and his home recuperating several Riders were lost on stage 14 but Stage 15 looked like this with three first category climbs and just under 180 kilometers of racing yet again it was full gas from the start and once more what fanart was found to be at the front of things but then this happened a spectator trying to take a selfie stepping out into the road causing a crash taking down several riders that naturally neutralized things behind without the race organizers having to do so it meant that the break could take a big gap eight minutes as they got over the first couple of categorized climbs and then Christoph Laporte went to work Julio chikorni was fighting to try and take the polka dot Jersey Nielsen paulus was in the break but struggling chiconi was equaling things up on the leaderboard but as Mark Soler took off with 48 kilometers to go what for not Then followed him Chris Nelons got involved and maybe the fight for a stage win was on behind the yellow Jersey group at six minutes looked almost out of it Chris nylons though had an incident with a motorbike thankfully he was back on his bike soon but he was out of the fight for the win pools and fanat found themselves on the final two Clines of the day and then pulls himself launched an attack a winner of a monument at the time then team Sky's first ever monument in liege he'd never ever won a grand to a stage despite helping big names to Grand Tour overall wins this group on the screen was at one and a half minutes the Peloton at seven and a half minutes but it was more a yellow Jersey group the favorites were all there UA Emirates took it up and we're trying to put pressure on as Paul's continued to ride and wheel away his Gap over fanart with just under 4ks to go over a minute that increased to 115 with three kilometers remaining behind the numbers were decreasing except Chris after having crashed early in the day hung on valiantly he was dropped along with Rodriguez Paul started at the front and Adam Yates left with only vinegar and yates's teammate pogacha but Yates started to Pedal away all that was happening whilst Pauls was winning a first ever Grand Tour stage at the age of 35. another one to dedicate to the memory of genome Bahrain winning again who will be winning the tour though they'd slowed up behind Rodriguez on the podium ice point and then pogacha attacking in the final kilometer to try and eek out a second or two the difference at the start of the day been 10. but vinegar was not seeding in fact he looked good pogacho would try one final time around that last Corner they came vinegar himself gave it a go but they rolled across together Jonas ringer War defending Champion has a 10 second lead going into the second and final resting Rodriguez backing up his win the day before with a good solid ride to stand the GC Podium adding the eights moving up into fourth place Jai hindley losing a place to fifth victory for Bahrain victory for Walt pools one of the peloton's great helpers becoming a stage winner in a grand tour second Roger authored with Cradock and Lander in the top five another day in the yellow Jersey for Jonas vinegar and yombo visma looking good but it's still tied at the top and the tour is on the line to play for Rodriguez up on the podium but it's only a 19 second lead over Adam Yates hinley in fifth cuss hanging on to sixth and Julio Ciccone taking over the lead in the king of the mountains competition a rest day next and then the race of Truth so tight on the road maybe a time trial is what we need to sort out this Tour de France it's a difficult one as well from passy to komblu 22.4 kilometers and a second category climb on the way up to a finish that second cat and a finish further up the road in comb loop as ever you'll be able to watch it live and On Demand on gcn plus until then we wish you a very good resting
